songs.title: The Rock Show
songs.album: Take Off Your Pants and Jacket
feed: “The Rock Show” by blink-182 returns to #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for a 2nd nonconsecutive week at the top.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 54 sales units.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 90 streams units.
“The Rock Show” by blink-182 is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 285,852 total units.
